changelog: Notifications: viewing a ticket now marks all its notifications as read automatically
Notifications: action-required notifications auto-resolve when ticket is closed, assignee responds, or ticket is reassigned
Notifications: badge count simplified — shows only unread and non-resolved notifications
Notifications: new 'Resolved' filter tab to view dismissed action notifications
Link previews: rich preview cards for Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides links in ticket content
Link previews: YouTube video thumbnails with play overlay
Link previews: Dropbox, OneDrive, Figma, and GitHub link cards with service icons
Link previews: direct image URLs (.png, .jpg, .gif, .webp) show inline thumbnails
Editor: paste or drag-and-drop images directly into ticket descriptions and comments
Editor: image toolbar button opens file picker for inline image upload
Editor: base64 data URI images are stripped server-side as a safety net
